mapper.select: SELECT se.event_date AS eventDate, se.stock_code AS stockCode, se.event_type AS eventType, se.title, se.detail FROM stock_events se INNER JOIN holdings_replica hr ON hr.stock_code = se.stock_code AND hr.user_id = #{userId} WHERE se.event_date >= #{from} AND se.event_date <= #{to} ORDER BY se.event_date ASC, se.event_type ASC
